audience_role: Diaspora adult child or household installer
language_plan: NE and EN first; Hinglish discovery
job_to_be_done: Help a parent or household ask about the right person
shipped_feature: Parivar profiles plus member-aware Jyotish Baje question
safe_claim: Save multiple birth profiles and ask Jyotish Baje about the family member you choose.
hypothesis: A family-specific opening will produce more qualified shares and profile-aware feature interest than a generic personal horoscope opening.
material_caveat: Only profiles the user chooses to add are available; never imply automatic family knowledge.

working_title: Made to be read in Nepali
job_to_be_done: Use Jyotish without translating the interface
safe_claim: Jyotish Baje is available in Nepali and English and the interface language can be switched in the app.
hypothesis: Seeing authentic Devanagari app proof immediately after intergenerational recognition will improve three-second hold and saves among Nepali-speaking households.
material_caveat: Nepali localization is first-class intent but a fluent reviewer must reject any leaked or unnatural English in the captured path.

job_to_be_done: Browse Nepali dates and keep a family event in the same place
shipped_feature: Bikram Sambat Patro with tithi and saved events
safe_claim: Browse Bikram Sambat dates and tithis and save family events in Nepali dates.
hypothesis: A concrete family-date job will drive more saves and completion than a broad daily astrology promise.
material_caveat: Use only synthetic event data and do not imply cloud reminders or unimplemented future astrology alerts.

job_to_be_done: See the calculation behind personalized guidance
shipped_feature: Computed Kundali with Lagna Rashi Nakshatra and Dasha
safe_claim: Generate a Vedic Kundali from entered birth details and inspect Lagna Rashi Nakshatra and Dasha.
hypothesis: A precision-craft visual followed by the real chart will improve qualified completion among users skeptical of generic horoscope content.
material_caveat: Traditional interpretation is not scientific prediction; input precision and unknown birth time can change chart-level detail.

audience_role: Adult seeking context for a current period
job_to_be_done: Understand the current Dasha period in ordinary language
shipped_feature: Deterministic current Mahadasha and Antardasha prepared report
safe_claim: Explore a Dasha report with current Mahadasha and Antardasha boundaries and the next Mahadasha date.
hypothesis: The plain-language life-chapter metaphor will increase report interest without using fear or deterministic future claims.
material_caveat: Birth-time uncertainty and calculation boundaries must remain visible; do not depict future alert scheduling.

working_title: Before the family chooses a time
job_to_be_done: Choose a traditionally supportive time for a planned family action
safe_claim: Find a Muhurat and see the Panchang factors behind the traditional timing guidance.
hypothesis: A recognizable household decision moment followed by visible evidence will improve qualified comments and feature starts over abstract auspicious imagery.
material_caveat: Supportive timing is not a guaranteed outcome and must never delay urgent or medically necessary action.

working_title: A score is not the whole relationship
job_to_be_done: Explore traditional compatibility without surrendering the decision
shipped_feature: Kundli Matching with Ashtakoota evidence and context
safe_claim: Explore traditional Kundli matching with the evidence explained; a score is context and not a relationship verdict.
hypothesis: Leading with shared agency rather than a perfect-match promise will generate more qualified saves and fewer fatalistic comments.
material_caveat: Never present score caste Nadi Mangal Dosha fertility or health as a command certainty or medical result.

audience_role: Older primary user or accessibility installer
job_to_be_done: Ask a natural question when typing is inconvenient
shipped_feature: Optional voice input with editable transcript
safe_claim: Dictate a question edit the transcript and send it to Jyotish Baje.
hypothesis: Showing the editable transcript immediately after an older speaker will improve feature comprehension and adult-child shares.
material_caveat: Speech recognition requires microphone permission and an available device speech service; typed replies do not automatically play audio.

job_to_be_done: Move a chosen birth profile between trusted family devices
shipped_feature: Parivar QR sharing scanning and receiver-selected relationship
safe_claim: Share a birth profile by Parivar QR with someone you trust; the receiver chooses the relationship before saving.
hypothesis: A two-time-zone family scene will make the QR handoff legible as continuity rather than technology and increase qualified shares among diaspora users.
material_caveat: The QR contains sensitive birth data; never show a readable payload and never suggest sharing beyond someone the user trusts.

working_title: When the question is about your child
job_to_be_done: Ask guidance about a saved child or family member
shipped_feature: Relationship-aware guidance using the selected complete birth profile
safe_claim: Ask Jyotish Baje about a saved family member using that person's selected complete birth profile.
hypothesis: A calm parental-care moment will increase family-profile activation without relying on danger visa exam health or outcome anxiety.
material_caveat: Do not imply surveillance automatic knowledge or guaranteed outcomes for a child; non-romantic guidance must avoid marriage or reproductive framing.

shipped_feature: Today's Panchang and Patro day details
safe_claim: See today's Tithi Nakshatra Yoga Karana local solar timings and other Panchang details.
hypothesis: A quiet morning-routine hook will improve repeat-oriented saves by framing Panchang as daily orientation rather than prediction.
material_caveat: Moonrise and moonset are approximate; location affects timings and must match the selected place.

working_title: From a birth detail to a Kundali
audience_role: New user or adult child helping a parent
job_to_be_done: Turn known birth details into immediate personalized evidence
shipped_feature: Paged birth flow plus computation ceremony and Rashi Nakshatra reveal
safe_claim: Enter birth details to generate a computed Rashi Nakshatra and Kundali reveal.
hypothesis: The emotionally familiar birth-note handoff followed by the real computation ceremony will improve completion and birth-profile intent.
material_caveat: Use only the synthetic QA profile; unknown or imprecise birth time reduces chart precision and must not be hidden.
